    130. 
            
              42
            

            

                      ns = { "D" => "DAV:" }

    131. 
            

            

            
          
      132. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    132. 
            
              42

      133.

      134.

      135.

              42
            

            

                      scope = case scope_node.name
          
      136. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    136. 
            
              37
            

            

                              when "exclusive" then :exclusive
          
      137. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    137. 
            
              5
            

            

                              when "shared"    then :shared
          
      138. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    138. 
            

            

                              else return nil
          
      139. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    139.

    140. 
            

            

            
          
      141. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    141.

      143.

                      depth_raw = @request.get_header("HTTP_DEPTH")
          
      144. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    144.

    148.

                    # Returns :zero or :infinity. Default is :infinity per RFC 4918.

    156.

      157. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    157. 
            
              1
            

            

                      when "0"        then :zero
          
      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            
              1
            

            

                      when "infinity" then :infinity
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            
              39

      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160.

      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161.

    162.

      164. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    164.

    165.

              2

    169. 
            
              1
            

            

                      when /\AInfinite\z/i then :infinite
          
      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170.

      171.

    184. 
            
              40
            

            

                      prop = doc.create_element("prop")
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185.

      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            
              40

      204.

    247. 
            

            

              # 9. LOCK refresh (If header, no body) → 200, no Lock-Token header
          
      248. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    248. 
            

            

              # ===========================================================================
          
      249. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    249. 
            
              1
            

            

              context "LOCK refresh with valid token" do
          
      250. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    250. 
            
              4
            

            

                before { File.write(File.join(tmpdir, "file.txt"), "hello") }
          
      251. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    251. 
            

            

            
          
      252. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    252. 
            
              1
            

            

                let(:lock_token) do
          
      253. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    253. 
            
              3
            

            

                  lock("/file.txt", {}, LOCKINFO_EXCLUSIVE)
          
      254. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    254. 
            
              3
            

            

                  token_header = last_response.headers["Lock-Token"]
          
      255. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    255. 
            

            

                  # Extract urn:uuid:... from <urn:uuid:...>
          
      256. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    256. 
            
              3
            

            

                  token_header.match(/<(urn:uuid:[^>]+)>/)[1]
          
      257. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    257. 
            

            

                end
          
      258. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    258. 
            

            

            
          
      259. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    259. 
            
              1
            

            

                it "returns 200 OK" do
          
      260. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    260. 
            
              1
            

            

                  token = lock_token
          
      261. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    261. 
            
              1
            

            

                  lock("/file.txt", { "HTTP_IF" => "(<#{token}>)" }, nil)
          
      262. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    262. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(last_response.status).to eq(200)
          
      263. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    263. 
            

            

                end
          
      264. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    264. 
            

            

            
          
      265. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    265. 
            
              1
            

            

                it "does NOT return a Lock-Token header" do
          
      266. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    266. 
            
              1
            

            

                  token = lock_token
          
      267. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    267. 
            
              1
            

            

                  lock("/file.txt", { "HTTP_IF" => "(<#{token}>)" }, nil)
          
      268. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    268. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(last_response.headers["Lock-Token"]).to be_nil
          
      269. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    269. 
            

            

                end
          
      270. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    270. 
            

            

            
          
      271. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    271. 
            
              1
            

            

                it "returns XML body with activelock" do
          
      272. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    272. 
            
              1
            

            

                  token = lock_token
          
      273. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    273. 
            
              1
            

            

                  lock("/file.txt", { "HTTP_IF" => "(<#{token}>)" }, nil)
          
      274. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    274. 
            
              1
            

            

                  doc = parse_xml(last_response.body)
          
      275. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    275. 
            
              1
            

            

                  activelock = doc.at_xpath("//D:activelock", dav_ns)
          
      276. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    276. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(activelock).not_to be_nil
          
      277. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    277.

      278. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    278.

      279. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    279. 
            

            

            
          
      280. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    280.

    310. 
            

            

              # 12. Shared lock behavior
          
      311. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    311. 
            

            

              # ===========================================================================
          
      312. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    312. 
            
              1
            

            

              context "two shared locks on the same resource" do
          
      313. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    313. 
            
              3
            

            

                before { File.write(File.join(tmpdir, "file.txt"), "hello") }
          
      314. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    314. 
            

            

            
          
      315. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    315. 
            
              1
            

            

                it "first shared lock returns 200 OK" do
          
      316. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    316. 
            
              1
            

            

                  lock("/file.txt", {}, LOCKINFO_SHARED)
          
      317. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    317. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(last_response.status).to eq(200)
          
      318. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    318. 
            

            

                end
          
      319. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    319. 
            

            

            
          
      320. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    320. 
            
              1
            

            

                it "second shared lock also returns 200 OK" do
          
      321. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    321. 
            
              1
            

            

                  lock("/file.txt", {}, LOCKINFO_SHARED)
          
      322. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    322. 
            
              1
            

            

                  lock("/file.txt", {}, LOCKINFO_SHARED)
          
      323. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    323. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(last_response.status).to eq(200)
          
      324. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    324. 
            

            

                end
          
      325. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    325. 
            

            

              end
          
      326. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    326. 
            

            

            
          
      327. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    327. 
            
              1
            

            

              context "shared lock then exclusive lock" do
          
      328. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    328. 
            
              1
            

            

                before do
          
      329. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    329. 
            
              1
            

            

                  File.write(File.join(tmpdir, "file.txt"), "hello")
          
      330. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    330. 
            
              1
            

            

                  lock("/file.txt", {}, LOCKINFO_SHARED)
          
      331. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    331. 
            

            

                end
          
      332. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    332. 
            

            

            
          
      333. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    333. 
            
              1
            

            

                it "returns 423 Locked" do
          
      334. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    334. 
            
              1
            

            

                  lock("/file.txt", {}, LOCKINFO_EXCLUSIVE)
          
      335. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    335. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(last_response.status).to eq(423)
          
      336. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    336. 
            

            

                end
          
      337. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    337. 
            

            

              end
          
      338. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    338. 
            

            

            
          
      339. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    339. 
            
              1
            

            

              context "exclusive lock then shared lock" do
          
      340. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    340. 
            
              1
            

            

                before do
          
      341.

              # 4. Named prop request for {DAV:}displayname returns just that property

              # 10. Invalid Depth header value → 400 Bad Request

              # =========================================================================

    354. 
            
              1

    355.

    275.

              LOCKINFO_EXCLUSIVE = <<~XML.freeze
          
      33.

                <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

                </D:lockinfo>

              # Helper: acquire a lock on the given path and return the raw token string
          
      41. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    41. 
            
              1

      42.

              5
            

            

                lock(path, {}, LOCKINFO_EXCLUSIVE)

              5
            

            

                token_header = last_response.headers["Lock-Token"]

              5
            

            

                token_header.match(/<(urn:uuid:[^>]+)>/)[1]
          
      45. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    45. 
            

            

              end

              # ─── Thread safety ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
          
      259. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    259. 
            

            

            
          
      260. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    260. 
            
              1
            

            

              describe "thread safety" do
          
      261. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    261. 
            
              1
            

            

                it "survives concurrent acquire calls without corrupting state" do
          
      262. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    262. 
            
              21
            

            

                  paths  = (1..20).map { |i| "/file#{i}.txt" }
          
      263. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    263. 
            
              1
            

            

                  errors = []
          
      264. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    264. 
            
              1
            

            

                  mutex  = Mutex.new
          
      265. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    265. 
            

            

            
          
      266. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    266. 
            
              1
            

            

                  threads = paths.map do |p|
          
      267. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    267. 
            
              20
            

            

                    Thread.new do
          
      268. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    268. 
            
              20
            

            

                      manager.acquire(p, scope: :exclusive, depth: :zero)
          
      269. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    269. 
            

            

                    rescue => e
          
      270. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    270. 
            

            

                      mutex.synchronize { errors << e }
          
      271. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    271. 
            

            

                    end
          
      272. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    272. 
            

            

                  end
          
      273. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    273. 
            

            

            
          
      274. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    274. 
            
              1
            

            

                  threads.each(&:join)
          
      275. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    275. 
            

            

            
          
      276. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    276. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(errors).to be_empty
          
      277. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    277. 
            

            

                  # All 20 paths should now be locked
          
      278. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    278. 
            
              1
            

            

                  paths.each do |p|
          
      279. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    279. 
            
              20
            

            

                    expect(manager.locked?(p)).to be(true)
          
      280. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    280. 
            

            

                  end
          
      281. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    281. 
            

            

                end
          
      282. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    282. 
            

            

              end
          
      283. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    283. 
            

            

            end

              describe "STATUS_MESSAGES" do

                  expect(messages[200]).to eq("OK")
          
      283.

              1
            

            

                  expect(messages[201]).to eq("Created")
          
      284. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    284. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(messages[204]).to eq("No Content")
          
      285.

              1
            

            

                  expect(messages[207]).to eq("Multi-Status")
          
      286. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    286. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(messages[400]).to eq("Bad Request")
          
      287. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    287. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(messages[403]).to eq("Forbidden")
          
      288. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    288. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(messages[404]).to eq("Not Found")
          
      289. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    289. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(messages[409]).to eq("Conflict")
          
      290. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    290. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(messages[412]).to eq("Precondition Failed")
          
      291. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    291. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(messages[422]).to eq("Unprocessable Entity")
          
      292. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    292. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(messages[423]).to eq("Locked")
          
      293. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    293. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(messages[424]).to eq("Failed Dependency")
          
      294. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    294. 
            
              1
            

            

                  expect(messages[507]).to eq("Insufficient Storage")
          
      295. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    295.
